content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be reconfigured to dynamically gate which environment experiences are stored in long-term episodic memory based on the intrinsic reward signal from curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods like ICM and RND. This replaces the generic uncertainty-based sampling common in modern active learning with a curiosity-aligned storage policy that prioritizes surprising, learnable novel experiences over just high-uncertainty out-of-distribution points.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
